title: Xenial Dense Syrian Ovoli Mushroom Tagine
description: A briny and energizing Syrian dish featuring ovoli mushrooms, cooked in a tagine with ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients, this recipe is perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the ovoli mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the tagine spice mix, sea salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth and lemon juice, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve the tagine hot over rice or couscous.
